resources.string: PIN code must be at least 4 digits
Remember to enable Biovarmenne in accessibility settings

Biovarmenne needs the accessibility service to detect when Mobiilivarmenne requests a PIN code and to fill it in automatically after fingerprint authentication.\n\nThe app only reads the Mobiilivarmenne screen and does not collect or transmit any data.
Biovarmenne detects the Mobiilivarmenne PIN request and fills it in automatically using your fingerprint.
⚠ Battery optimization may stop the service
Tap to update your PIN in Biovarmenne
Enter the PIN code you use with Mobiilivarmenne
⚠ Xiaomi devices require the \"Display pop-up windows while running in the background\" permission to show the PIN prompt.
⚠ Autostart is required on Xiaomi devices to keep the background service alive
Update downloaded and ready to install
Are you sure you want to clear the saved PIN?
Biovarmenne makes Mobiilivarmenne authentication secure, effortless, and easy to use.\n\nThis wizard will help you set up the necessary settings so you can stop manually typing your PIN code.

For Biovarmenne to automatically detect Mobiilivarmenne requests, it needs to run freely in the background. The app\'s impact on battery consumption is minimal.\n\nTap the button below and disable battery optimization.

Your device requires two additional settings to work:

1. Display pop-up windows while running in the background.
2. Enable Autostart.
Biovarmenne uses the accessibility service to detect when a PIN code is requested.\n\nThe service only monitors the Mobiilivarmenne screen. No data is collected or transmitted.
Finally, enter the same PIN code you use for Mobiilivarmenne. It will be securely stored on your device using AES-256 encryption and will never leave your phone.
